# FitResult { #tspaint.FitResult }

```python
tspaint.FitResult(Q, pi, w, loglik_history)
```

Fitted parameters returned by :func:`fit`.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Fitted generator.

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Fitted root frequencies.

<code>[**w**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Learned per-tip credibility for soft refs (empty if hard-clamp).

<code>[**loglik_history**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Observed-data log-likelihood per E-step (non-decreasing).
